seoTitle: How to Upload a Digital Product on Gumroad
metaDescription: Publish any digital product on Gumroad — ebooks, templates, software, or music — by creating a listing, uploading files, and setting pricing.
intro: Whether you're selling ebooks, PDFs, templates, software, or music, the process for getting a digital product live on Gumroad follows the same core steps: create a listing, upload the files, and set your price. This guide walks through each stage from product creation to publishing.

steps.heading: Create a new product
steps.body: Start a new product listing in your Gumroad dashboard.

steps.heading: Upload digital files
steps.body: Add the actual files customers will receive — ebooks, templates, software, music, or whatever your product is.

steps.heading: Add product details and images
steps.body: Write a product description and upload cover images or previews that represent what you're selling.

steps.heading: Set price and publish
steps.body: Choose your pricing and checkout options, then publish the product to make it live for customers.

faq.question: What types of digital products can I sell on Gumroad?
faq.answer: Gumroad supports ebooks, PDFs, templates, software, courses, music, and most other downloadable digital file types.

faq.question: Is there a file size limit for uploads?
faq.answer: Gumroad has upload size limits that can vary, so check current platform limits if you're uploading large files like video courses.

faq.question: Can I edit a product after publishing it?
faq.answer: Yes, you can go back into your product listing to update files, pricing, or details at any time.

faq.question: How do customers receive the product after buying?
faq.answer: Once payment completes, customers get instant access to download the files you uploaded to the product.
